sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10942" key="a)nwmale/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνωμᾰλ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n10942.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">suffer ups and downs of fortune,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nech.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:279:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">279.28</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:65:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">65.6</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:2:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
